// note: Compiles the harness + retro FPS game (web/src/*.ts) to web/dist/*.js. The dev server runs `tsgo -p` on this. `@axiom/game` resolves to the package's built declarations for typecheck; the emitted JS keeps the bare specifier, resolved in the browser by the import map in index.html. The shared axiom-game-runtime wasm + the SDK boot edge resolve by absolute path, served by the dev server.
